title: Automation on Subitem Status - Clear Column
excerpt: For Subitems, is there an Automation to clear the status at certain time/date intervals?  For example, I can set a top line item’s automation to ‘every day at 1pm, clear status’.  But cannot seem to do similar automation…

posts.author: sharris (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
For Subitems, is there an Automation to clear the status at certain time/date intervals? For example, I can set a top line item’s automation to ‘every day at 1pm, clear status’. But cannot seem to do similar automation on subitems status fields.

Development on this request or a recommended action/fix would be great!

posts.author: madeline (Madeline Lynch)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s not possible yet. The only column you can clear automatically right now (for subitems) is a people column.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
